narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 2-A (precinct in Huron County) has 941 registered voters, with 50.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.7 percentage points.
